pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect timestamp calculation in ethernet IF4p5 interface

### Summary
Fix a critical timestamp calculation bug in the ethernet IF4p5 interface that was causing incorrect transmit power levels downstream. The `trx_eth_read_raw_IF4p5` function was incorrectly assigning `test_header->sub_type` to the timestamp pointer, resulting in invalid timing information being propagated to upper layers. This caused the power control algorithm to make decisions based on corrupted frame/subframe
